chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6047 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 16.12.2024 None present for the petitioner. In view of the judgment dated 26.09.2024 passed by the honourable Supreme Court in Civil Petition 3390/2021 [General Post Office & Others vs. Muhammad Jalal], this petition is not maintainable, hence, dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
